final_code:
import duckdb, os

DB_PATH = "your_database_path_here"

def run_anomaly_report():
    if not os.path.exists(DB_PATH):
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Database file not found at {DB_PATH}")

    conn = duckdb.connect(DB_PATH, read_only=True)
    df = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM silver_transactions").fetchdf()

    total_val = df["amount"].sum()

    df_filtered = df[df["amount"] > 100]

    count = df_filtered.shape[0]

    conn.close()

    print(f"Total: {total_val}, Count: {count}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_anomaly_report()
